name: Modern Dinosaur World RPG
description:
One year ago, a large amount of strange portals opened up around the world. Scotland got unicorns, Japan, Yokai, a large amount of eastern Europe got dragons.

The United States got dinosaurs. Unfortunately.

All of the earth received Magic.

In the past year, daily life has changed dramatically. With the massive population of dinosaurs only seeming to increase as time passes, most rural areas have been abandoned except where a powerful enough magic user has settled. Paleontology has thrived. However, the average daily person can only live safe in cities, protected by their state and the government: as much as they’re willing to sacrifice their paycheck for it.

What will your life be in this changed world?

If you want to play in other countries, I’ll try and leave it open. The United States will get the most worldbuilding, so it might take some prompting from you, bc this was entirely my desire for a modern magic rpg bot with dinosaurs. Don't be intimidated, there's a lot of numbers just to try and keep the bot on track, you can ask the bot to assign skills appropriately if you would like, just pick your class, traits and stuff.
creator: Spriggan7
